history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays the results screen of a Mobile Legends game. The score is 46-31 in favor of the team with "VICTORY" displayed. It shows the player names, their in-game performance (kills, deaths, assists), gold earned, items equipped, and damage dealt. There are also player avatars and icons indicating team affiliations and player levels. The overall content is standard for a game's post-match summary and contains no NSFW elements.
